global.description: The ad features a green background with product images and a discount offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a discount on products with free shipping.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: Three rectangular boxes arranged horizontally, representing product images or options.

elements.label: Product image 1
elements.description: A rectangular box with a placeholder for a product image, located on the left side.

elements.label: Product image 2
elements.description: A rectangular box with a placeholder for a product image, located in the center.

elements.label: Product image 3
elements.description: A rectangular box with a placeholder for a product image, located on the right side.

elements.label: Discount text
elements.description: Text displaying a discount offer, prominently placed below the product images.

elements.label: Shipping icon
elements.description: A small icon representing free shipping, located near the discount text.

elements.label: Shipping icon
elements.description: Another small icon representing free shipping, located near the discount text.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: Text displaying the price of €9.99, located near the discount offer.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button labeled 'Learn more', encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo for 'CrispBox', positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: A small text label indicating user-generated content, located near the logo.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25 €9.99 Learn more
